title: clypeola jonthlaspi proles suffrutescens
intro: Clypeola jonthlaspi proles suffrutescens, also known as Shepherd's Purse, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stop bleeding, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Clypeola jonthlaspi proles suffrutescens include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Clypeola jonthlaspi proles suffrutescens is often made into tea, capsules, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
